hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext: MANDATORY SKILL ROUTING (user-configured, applies to every session): When a task matches one of these shapes, invoking the matching skill via the Skill tool is COMPULSORY before working from memory — match by task shape, not by whether the user names the skill. Unfamiliar codebase/architecture -> arch-recon. Hunting bugs/auditing correctness -> bug-hunt. Security review/hardening your own system (auth, injection, secrets) -> security-audit. Scale/capacity/what-breaks-at-10x questions -> scalability-audit. Making correct code faster / why is this slow (measure a real workload) -> perf-profile. Fixing a known defect -> fix-design. Restructuring code WITHOUT changing behavior (rename/extract/dedupe) -> refactor-safe. After any code change, before done -> durability-check. Verifying a claim/doc/number -> fact-check. Designing or building ANY UI -> ui-excellence. Frontend with 3+ screens, or user wants designs/mockups first -> ui-design-preview (hard approval gate before FE code). About to write any new code -> test-first. New/early-stage project, PRD needed -> product-recon (includes Azure DevOps backlog). Implementing from a PRD/spec -> vibe-build (stack + mobile question, auth toggle, /docs page). Creating/updating/tailoring a CV or resume, any field -> ats-cv (parse audit, ONE question batch, no invented facts). Cover letter for a specific job from JD + CV -> cover-letter (proof map, swap test). Preparing for a specific interview from JD + CV -> interview-prep. Turning a CV into an optimized LinkedIn profile -> linkedin-optimizer. Unsure which fits, several apply, or a full pipeline is starting -> invoke master-workflow FIRST and follow its chains and gates. Routing without invoking is a violation.
